content:
"""Generate OpenLane/LibreLane configuration for flat wrapper hardening.

The wrapper is the top-level design for hardening.  All RTL (wrapper +
compute_ss + all IPs) is synthesized flat — no hierarchical macros.
The only hard macro is CF_SRAM_1024x32.

The padframe-gen ``core.def`` is used as a DEF template so the wrapper
gets the correct die size and pin locations.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import math
import re
import shutil
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple


# ── Standard PDN TCL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

_PDN_CFG_TCL = """\
# Power delivery network configuration for {design_name}
# met4/met5 main grid + met3 bridge for CF_SRAM_1024x32 macro power
# Compatible with OpenLane 2 / LibreLane

source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/set_global_connections.tcl
set_global_connections

set secondary []
foreach vdd $::env(VDD_NETS) gnd $::env(GND_NETS) {{
    if {{ $vdd != $::env(VDD_NET)}} {{
        lappend secondary $vdd

        set db_net [[ord::get_db_block] findNet $vdd]
        if {{$db_net == "NULL"}} {{
            set net [odb::dbNet_create [ord::get_db_block] $vdd]
            $net setSpecial
            $net setSigType "POWER"
        }}
    }}

    if {{ $gnd != $::env(GND_NET)}} {{
        lappend secondary $gnd

        set db_net [[ord::get_db_block] findNet $gnd]
        if {{$db_net == "NULL"}} {{
            set net [odb::dbNet_create [ord::get_db_block] $gnd]
            $net setSpecial
            $net setSigType "GROUND"
        }}
    }}
}}

set_voltage_domain -name CORE -power $::env(VDD_NET) -ground $::env(GND_NET) \\
    -secondary_power $secondary

# \u2500\u2500 Main stdcell grid: met4 (vertical) / met5 (horizontal) \u2500\u2500

define_pdn_grid \\
    -name stdcell_grid \\
    -starts_with POWER \\
    -voltage_domain CORE \\
    -pins "$::env(FP_PDN_VERTICAL_LAYER) $::env(FP_PDN_HORIZONTAL_LAYER)"

add_pdn_stripe \\
    -grid stdcell_grid \\
    -layer $::env(FP_PDN_VERTICAL_LAYER) \\
    -width $::env(FP_PDN_VWIDTH) \\
    -pitch $::env(FP_PDN_VPITCH) \\
    -offset $::env(FP_PDN_VOFFSET) \\
    -spacing $::env(FP_PDN_VSPACING) \\
    -starts_with POWER -extend_to_core_ring

add_pdn_stripe \\
    -grid stdcell_grid \\
    -layer $::env(FP_PDN_HORIZONTAL_LAYER) \\
    -width $::env(FP_PDN_HWIDTH) \\
    -pitch $::env(FP_PDN_HPITCH) \\
    -offset $::env(FP_PDN_HOFFSET) \\
    -spacing $::env(FP_PDN_HSPACING) \\
    -starts_with POWER -extend_to_core_ring

add_pdn_connect \\
    -grid stdcell_grid \\
    -layers "$::env(FP_PDN_VERTICAL_LAYER) $::env(FP_PDN_HORIZONTAL_LAYER)"

# \u2500\u2500 Stdcell rails (met1) \u2500\u2500

if {{ $::env(FP_PDN_ENABLE_RAILS) == 1 }} {{
    add_pdn_stripe \\
        -grid stdcell_grid \\
        -layer $::env(FP_PDN_RAIL_LAYER) \\
        -width $::env(FP_PDN_RAIL_WIDTH) \\
        -followpins \\
        -starts_with POWER

    add_pdn_connect \\
        -grid stdcell_grid \\
        -layers "$::env(FP_PDN_RAIL_LAYER) $::env(FP_PDN_VERTICAL_LAYER)"
}}

# \u2500\u2500 Core ring \u2500\u2500

if {{ $::env(FP_PDN_CORE_RING) == 1 }} {{
    add_pdn_ring \\
        -grid stdcell_grid \\
        -layers "$::env(FP_PDN_VERTICAL_LAYER) $::env(FP_PDN_HORIZONTAL_LAYER)" \\
        -widths "$::env(FP_PDN_CORE_RING_VWIDTH) $::env(FP_PDN_CORE_RING_HWIDTH)" \\
        -spacings "$::env(FP_PDN_CORE_RING_VSPACING) $::env(FP_PDN_CORE_RING_HSPACING)" \\
        -core_offset "$::env(FP_PDN_CORE_RING_VOFFSET) $::env(FP_PDN_CORE_RING_HOFFSET)"
}}

# \u2500\u2500 SRAM macro grid \u2500\u2500
# CF_SRAM_1024x32 has power pins on met2.
# Add met3 stripes over each macro so OpenROAD can build the via stack:
#   met2 (pin) \u2192 met3 (stripe) \u2192 met4 (main grid strap)

define_pdn_grid \\
    -macro \\
    -default \\
    -name macro \\
    -starts_with POWER \\
    -halo "$::env(FP_PDN_HORIZONTAL_HALO) $::env(FP_PDN_VERTICAL_HALO)"

add_pdn_stripe \\
    -grid macro \\
    -layer met3 \\
    -width 0.48 \\
    -pitch 10.0 \\
    -offset 5.0 \\
    -spacing 0.30 \\
    -starts_with POWER

add_pdn_connect \\
    -grid macro \\
    -layers "met2 met3"

add_pdn_connect \\
    -grid macro \\
    -layers "met3 met4"
"""

# CF_SRAM_1024x32 power pins that need PDN connections
_SRAM_POWER_PINS: List[Tuple[str, str]] = [
    ("vpwra", "vgnd"),
    ("vpb", "vnb"),
    ("vpwrp", "vgnd"),
    ("vpwrm", "vgnd"),
]


# ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


def _parse_def_die_area(def_path: Path) -> Tuple[float, float]:
    """Parse die width and height in µm from a DEF file DIEAREA statement."""
    units = 1000  # default: 1000 DEF units per µm
    for line in def_path.read_text().splitlines():
        m = re.match(r"UNITS\s+DISTANCE\s+MICRONS\s+(\d+)", line)
        if m:
            units = int(m.group(1))
        m = re.match(r"DIEAREA\s+\(\s*([\d.]+)\s+([\d.]+)\s*\)\s+\(\s*([\d.]+)\s+([\d.]+)\s*\)", line)
        if m:
            x1, y1, x2, y2 = (float(v) for v in m.groups())
            return (x2 - x1) / units, (y2 - y1) / units
    raise ValueError(f"Could not parse DIEAREA from {def_path}")


def _find_sram_paths(nc_lib_root: Path) -> Dict[str, str]:
    """Locate CF_SRAM_1024x32 artifacts relative to nc_lib_root."""
    sram_base = nc_lib_root / "CF_SRAM_1024x32"
    return {
        "gds": str(sram_base / "gds" / "CF_SRAM_1024x32.gds"),
        "lef": str(sram_base / "lef" / "CF_SRAM_1024x32.lef"),
        "lib_tt": str(sram_base / "lib" / "CF_SRAM_1024x32_tt_180V_25C.lib"),
        "lib_ss": str(sram_base / "lib" / "CF_SRAM_1024x32_ss_160V_100C.lib"),
        "lib_ff": str(sram_base / "lib" / "CF_SRAM_1024x32_ff_195V_100C.lib"),
        "hdl": str(sram_base / "hdl" / "CF_SRAM_1024x32.v"),
        "stub": str(sram_base / "hdl" / "CF_SRAM_1024x32_stub.v"),
    }


def _extract_sram_instances(compute_ss_path: Path) -> List[str]:
    """Parse compute_ss RTL to find CF_SRAM_1024x32 instance names."""
    if not compute_ss_path.exists():
        return []
    text = compute_ss_path.read_text()
    return [m.group(1) for m in re.finditer(r"CF_SRAM_1024x32\s+(\w+)\s*\(", text)]


def _pdn_macro_connections(
    instances: List[str],
    vdd_net: str = "VCCD",
    gnd_net: str = "VSSD",
) -> List[str]:
    """Build PDN_MACRO_CONNECTIONS entries for CF_SRAM_1024x32 instances."""
    connections = []
    for inst in instances:
        for vpin, gpin in _SRAM_POWER_PINS:
            connections.append(f"{inst} {vdd_net} {gnd_net} {vpin} {gpin}")
    return connections


_SRAM_WIDTH_UM  = 387.870  # CF_SRAM_1024x32 macro width  (µm)
_SRAM_HEIGHT_UM = 306.775  # CF_SRAM_1024x32 macro height (µm)
_SRAM_ORIGIN_X  = 40.0     # lower-left X of first macro  (µm)
_SRAM_ORIGIN_Y  = 40.0     # lower-left Y of first macro  (µm)
_SRAM_GAP_UM    = 200.0    # minimum gap between macros   (µm)


def _write_macro_cfg(
    path: Path,
    instances: List[str],
    core_area: Tuple[float, float, float, float],
) -> None:
    """Write macro.cfg placement file in a grid layout within the core area.

    Macros are arranged in the most square grid that fits, starting at
    (_SRAM_ORIGIN_X, _SRAM_ORIGIN_Y) from the core lower-left corner with
    _SRAM_GAP_UM clearance between each macro in both directions.
    Raises ValueError if the macros cannot fit in the core area.
    """
    core_x0, core_y0, core_x1, core_y1 = core_area
    core_w = core_x1 - core_x0
    core_h = core_y1 - core_y0
    n = len(instances)

    def fits(cols: int) -> bool:
        rows = math.ceil(n / cols)
        w = _SRAM_ORIGIN_X + cols * _SRAM_WIDTH_UM + (cols - 1) * _SRAM_GAP_UM + _SRAM_ORIGIN_X
        h = _SRAM_ORIGIN_Y + rows * _SRAM_HEIGHT_UM + (rows - 1) * _SRAM_GAP_UM + _SRAM_ORIGIN_Y
        return w <= core_w and h <= core_h

    # Pick the most-square valid grid (minimise |cols - rows|)
    best_cols = None
    best_score = float("inf")
    for cols in range(1, n + 1):
        if fits(cols):
            rows = math.ceil(n / cols)
            score = abs(cols - rows)
            if score < best_score:
                best_score = score
                best_cols = cols

    if best_cols is None:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Cannot fit {n} CF_SRAM_1024x32 macros "
            f"({_SRAM_WIDTH_UM}×{_SRAM_HEIGHT_UM} µm) with {_SRAM_GAP_UM} µm gap "
            f"in core area {core_w:.1f}×{core_h:.1f} µm"
        )

    cols = best_cols
    lines = []
    for i, inst in enumerate(instances):
        col = i % cols
        row = i // cols
        x = core_x0 + _SRAM_ORIGIN_X + col * (_SRAM_WIDTH_UM + _SRAM_GAP_UM)
        y = core_y0 + _SRAM_ORIGIN_Y + row * (_SRAM_HEIGHT_UM + _SRAM_GAP_UM)
        lines.append(f"{inst} {x:.3f} {y:.3f} N\n")
    path.write_text("".join(lines))


# ── Flat wrapper config ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def generate_wrapper_config(
    design_name: str,
    wrapper_verilog: str,
    all_verilog_files: List[str],
    sdc_path: str,
    nc_lib_root: Path,
    def_template_path: str,
    pdn_cfg_path: str,
    die_width_um: float,
    die_height_um: float,
    ring_inset_um: float = 315.0,
    sram_instances: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    clock_period: float = 25.0,
    include_dirs: Optional[List[str]] = None,
) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Build a flat wrapper OpenLane config.

    Everything is synthesized into the wrapper — compute_ss and all IPs
    are flattened.  Only CF_SRAM_1024x32 remains as a hard macro.
    The padframe-gen core.def provides the floorplan (die size + pins).
    """
    core_x0 = ring_inset_um
    core_y0 = ring_inset_um
    core_x1 = die_width_um - ring_inset_um
    core_y1 = die_height_um - ring_inset_um

    sram = _find_sram_paths(nc_lib_root)

    verilog_files = [wrapper_verilog] + all_verilog_files

    config: Dict[str, Any] = {
        "meta": {"version": 2},
        "DESIGN_NAME": f"{design_name}_wrapper",
        "CLOCK_PORT": "clk_in",
        "CLOCK_PERIOD": clock_period,
        "CLOCK_NET": "clk_in",
        "VERILOG_FILES": verilog_files,
        "// Synthesis": "Full flat synthesis \u2014 everything except CF_SRAM_1024x32",
        "FP_CORE_UTIL": 35.0,
        "RUN_LINTER": False,
        "ERROR_ON_SYNTH_CHECKS": False,
    }

    if include_dirs:
        config["VERILOG_INCLUDE_DIRS"] = include_dirs

    config["PNR_SDC_FILE"] = sdc_path
    config["SIGNOFF_SDC_FILE"] = sdc_path

    config["// Floorplan"] = "Die/core from padframe-gen DEF template"
    config["FP_SIZING"] = "absolute"
    config["DIE_AREA"] = [0.0, 0.0, die_width_um, die_height_um]
    config["CORE_AREA"] = [core_x0, core_y0, core_x1, core_y1]
    config["FP_DEF_TEMPLATE"] = def_template_path
    config["// DEF template"] = "permissive matching + copy power pins from padframe DEF"
    config["FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS"] = True
    config["FP_TEMPLATE_MATCH_MODE"] = "permissive"

    config["// Power"] = "Core power nets"
    config["VDD_NETS"] = ["VCCD"]
    config["GND_NETS"] = ["VSSD"]

    config["// PDN"] = "met4/met5 main grid + custom pdn for SRAM macro hookup"
    config["FP_PDN_MULTILAYER"] = True
    config["ERROR_ON_PDN_VIOLATIONS"] = False
    config["FP_PDN_CFG"] = pdn_cfg_path
    config["FP_PDN_VPITCH"] = 100
    config["FP_PDN_HPITCH"] = 100
    config["FP_PDN_VOFFSET"] = 25
    config["FP_PDN_HOFFSET"] = 25
    config["FP_PDN_VWIDTH"] = 3.2
    config["FP_PDN_HWIDTH"] = 3.2
    config["FP_PDN_HSPACING"] = 1.6
    config["FP_PDN_VSPACING"] = 1.6
    config["FP_PDN_CORE_RING"] = True
    config["FP_PDN_CORE_RING_VWIDTH"] = 6
    config["FP_PDN_CORE_RING_HWIDTH"] = 6
    config["FP_PDN_CORE_RING_VOFFSET"] = -4
    config["FP_PDN_CORE_RING_HOFFSET"] = -4
    config["FP_PDN_CORE_RING_VSPACING"] = 2.4
    config["FP_PDN_CORE_RING_HSPACING"] = 2.4

    # CF_SRAM_1024x32 — the only hard macro
    if sram_instances:
        config["// SRAM macros"] = "CF_SRAM_1024x32 \u2014 4 instances, power hooks, placement"
        config["EXTRA_LEFS"] = [sram["lef"]]
        config["EXTRA_GDS_FILES"] = [sram["gds"]]
        config["EXTRA_LIBS"] = [
            sram["lib_ff"],
            sram["lib_ss"],
            sram["lib_tt"],
        ]
        config["EXTRA_VERILOG_MODELS"] = [sram["stub"]]
        config["MACROS"] = {
            "CF_SRAM_1024x32": {
                "gds": [sram["gds"]],
                "lef": [sram["lef"]],
                "instances": {
                    inst: {"location": None, "orientation": "N"}
                    for inst in sram_instances
                },
                "lib": {
                    "nom_*": [sram["lib_tt"]],
                    "min_*": [sram["lib_ss"]],
                    "max_*": [sram["lib_ff"]],
                },
            }
        }
        config["MACRO_PLACEMENT_CFG"] = "dir::macro.cfg"
        config["PDN_MACRO_CONNECTIONS"] = _pdn_macro_connections(sram_instances)

    config["// Signoff"] = "relaxed for initial hardening"
    config["MAGIC_DEF_LABELS"] = False
    config["MAGIC_EXT_USE_GDS"] = True
    config["RUN_IRDROP_REPORT"] = False
    config["RUN_MAGIC_DRC"] = False
    config["RUN_LVS"] = False
    config["ERROR_ON_MAGIC_DRC"] = False
    config["GRT_ADJUSTMENT"] = 0.2

    return config


# ── Write everything ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _rewrite_paths(
    paths: List[str],
    socgen_dir: Path,
    rtl_out_dir: Path,
) -> List[str]:
    """Rewrite paths that reference the socgen temp dir to the output RTL dir.

    Also filters out paths that don't exist (e.g. stale temp dir refs).
    """
    socgen_str = str(socgen_dir)
    result = []
    for p in paths:
        if socgen_str in p:
            fname = Path(p).name
            rewritten = rtl_out_dir / fname
            if rewritten.exists():
                result.append(str(rewritten))
            else:
                src = Path(p)
                if src.exists():
                    shutil.copy2(src, rewritten)
                    result.append(str(rewritten))
        else:
            result.append(p)
    return result


def _rewrite_include_dirs(
    dirs: List[str],
    socgen_dir: Path,
    rtl_out_dir: Path,
) -> List[str]:
    """Rewrite include dirs, dropping temp dir refs and fixing broken paths."""
    socgen_str = str(socgen_dir)
    result = []
    for d in dirs:
        if socgen_str in d:
            result.append(str(rtl_out_dir))
        elif Path(d).exists():
            result.append(d)
    seen: set = set()
    deduped = []
    for d in result:
        if d not in seen:
            seen.add(d)
            deduped.append(d)
    return deduped


def _patch_sdc_for_wrapper(sdc_path: Path, clock_period: float) -> None:
    """Rewrite a socgen-generated SDC so it targets the wrapper clock port.

    gen_soc.py emits SDC with clock port ``clk`` (the compute_ss port name).
    At wrapper level the port is ``clk_in``, and the timing target is the
    wrapper clock period (default 25 ns), not the internal 10 ns.
    """
    if not sdc_path.exists():
        return
    text = sdc_path.read_text()

    # Replace clock port name
    text = re.sub(r"(set __socgen_clk_port\s*\{)clk(\})", r"\1clk_in\2", text)

    # Replace clock period
    io_delay = round(clock_period * 0.4, 6)
    text = re.sub(
        r"(set __socgen_clk_period\s*)[\d.]+",
        lambda m: f"{m.group(1)}{clock_period:.6f}",
        text,
    )
    text = re.sub(
        r"(set __socgen_io_delay\s*)[\d.]+",
        lambda m: f"{m.group(1)}{io_delay:.6f}",
        text,
    )

    # Update the human-readable comment header
    text = re.sub(
        r"# Clock: clk @ [\d.]+ ns",
        f"# Clock: clk_in @ {clock_period:.6f} ns",
        text,
    )
    text = re.sub(
        r"# I/O delay: [\d.]+% of clock \([\d.]+ ns\)",
        f"# I/O delay: 40.000% of clock ({io_delay:.6f} ns)",
        text,
    )

    sdc_path.write_text(text)


def write_openlane_configs(
    out_dir: Path,
    design_name: str,
    top_module: str,
    nc_lib_root: Path,
    socgen_dir: Path,
    padframe_dir: Path,
    wrapper_rtl_path: Path,
    power_domains: List[Dict[str, Any]],
    die_width_um: float,
    die_height_um: float,
    ring_inset_um: float = 315.0,
    clock_period: float = 25.0,
) -> Dict[str, str]:
    """Generate the flat wrapper OpenLane config + supporting files.

    Returns dict of generated file paths.
    """
    result: Dict[str, str] = {}

    ol_wrapper = out_dir / "openlane" / f"{design_name}_wrapper"
    ol_wrapper.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    rtl_out_dir = out_dir / "verilog" / "rtl"

    # ── Read socgen-generated config for Verilog file list ────────
    socgen_config_path = socgen_dir / "openlane" / top_module / "config.json"
    socgen_cfg = {}
    if socgen_config_path.exists():
        socgen_cfg = json.loads(socgen_config_path.read_text())

    all_verilog_files = socgen_cfg.get("VERILOG_FILES", [])
    include_dirs = socgen_cfg.get("VERILOG_INCLUDE_DIRS", [])

    all_verilog_files = _rewrite_paths(all_verilog_files, socgen_dir, rtl_out_dir)
    include_dirs = _rewrite_include_dirs(include_dirs, socgen_dir, rtl_out_dir)

    # Extract SRAM instances from compute_ss RTL, prefix with wrapper instance name
    compute_ss_rtl = rtl_out_dir / f"{top_module}.v"
    if not compute_ss_rtl.exists():
        compute_ss_rtl = socgen_dir / "rtl" / f"{top_module}.v"
    raw_instances = _extract_sram_instances(compute_ss_rtl)
    sram_instances = [f"u_core.{inst}" for inst in raw_instances]

    # ── Copy core.def as DEF template ─────────────────────────────
    core_def_src = padframe_dir / design_name / "core.def"
    fixed_dir = ol_wrapper / "fixed_dont_change"
    fixed_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    def_template = fixed_dir / f"{design_name}_wrapper.def"
    if core_def_src.exists():
        shutil.copy2(core_def_src, def_template)
        die_width_um, die_height_um = _parse_def_die_area(core_def_src)
    result["def_template"] = str(def_template)

    # ── Write pdn_cfg.tcl ─────────────────────────────────────────
    pdn_cfg_path = ol_wrapper / "pdn_cfg.tcl"
    pdn_cfg_path.write_text(_PDN_CFG_TCL.format(design_name=f"{design_name}_wrapper"))
    result["pdn_cfg"] = str(pdn_cfg_path)

    # ── Copy + patch SDC ──────────────────────────────────────────
    sdc_src = socgen_dir / "openlane" / top_module / f"{top_module}.sdc"
    sdc_dst = ol_wrapper / f"{design_name}_wrapper.sdc"
    if sdc_src.exists():
        shutil.copy2(sdc_src, sdc_dst)
    _patch_sdc_for_wrapper(sdc_dst, clock_period)

    # ── Write macro.cfg ───────────────────────────────────────────
    if sram_instances:
        core_area = (
            ring_inset_um,
            ring_inset_um,
            die_width_um - ring_inset_um,
            die_height_um - ring_inset_um,
        )
        macro_cfg_path = ol_wrapper / "macro.cfg"
        _write_macro_cfg(macro_cfg_path, sram_instances, core_area)
        result["macro_cfg"] = str(macro_cfg_path)

    # ── Generate config ───────────────────────────────────────────
    config = generate_wrapper_config(
        design_name=design_name,
        wrapper_verilog=str(wrapper_rtl_path),
        all_verilog_files=all_verilog_files,
        sdc_path=f"dir::{design_name}_wrapper.sdc",
        nc_lib_root=nc_lib_root,
        def_template_path=f"dir::fixed_dont_change/{design_name}_wrapper.def",
        pdn_cfg_path="dir::pdn_cfg.tcl",
        die_width_um=die_width_um,
        die_height_um=die_height_um,
        ring_inset_um=ring_inset_um,
        sram_instances=sram_instances if sram_instances else None,
        clock_period=clock_period,
        include_dirs=include_dirs if include_dirs else None,
    )

    config_path = ol_wrapper / "config.json"
    config_path.write_text(json.dumps(config, indent=2) + "\n")
    result["wrapper_config"] = str(config_path)

    return result
